subtopics.subtopicName: Number language: natural numbers, integers, primes, factors, multiples, squares, cubes, reciprocals, directed numbers
Calculation skills: order of operations, calculator use, fractions, decimals, percentages, ratio and proportion
Accuracy and estimation: rounding, significant figures, decimal places, upper and lower bounds, error intervals
Standard form and indices: powers, roots, standard form, laws of indices
Sets and Venn diagrams: set language, notation, union, intersection, complement
Financial and time applications: percentages, simple and compound interest, depreciation, speed, density, pressure, time calculations
Algebraic manipulation: use of symbols, substitution, expansion, factorisation, simplification, algebraic fractions
Linear and quadratic equations and inequalities: solving, rearranging formulae, simultaneous equations
Sequences: nth term, patterns, arithmetic sequences
Direct and inverse proportion: algebraic and graphical representation
Graphs of functions: linear, quadratic, cubic, reciprocal, exponential; gradient of linear graphs (Extended)
Sketching curves and curve properties (Extended)
Functions and mappings (Extended): function notation, composite functions, inverse functions
Cartesian coordinates: plotting points, midpoint, distance
Equation of a straight line: y = mx + c, gradient, intercepts, parallel and perpendicular lines
Graphical solution of equations and inequalities
Geometric vocabulary and notation: points, lines, planes, polygons, circles, symmetry
Constructions: perpendicular bisector, angle bisector, loci
Angle properties: angles at a point, on a straight line, in triangles, quadrilaterals, polygons, parallel lines
Circle theorems (Extended): angles in semicircle, tangent-chord, alternate segment, cyclic quadrilaterals
Similarity and congruence: criteria, scale factors, area and volume ratios
Transformations: reflection, rotation, translation, enlargement, combined transformations
Units of measurement: metric and imperial conversions, compound units
Perimeter and area of 2D shapes: rectangle, triangle, parallelogram, trapezium, circle, sector, segment
Volume and surface area of 3D shapes: prism, cylinder, sphere, cone, pyramid
Arc length and sector area of a circle
Rates: speed, density, pressure, distance-time and speed-time graphs
Trigonometric ratios: sine, cosine, tangent in right-angled triangles
Bearings and angles of elevation and depression
Sine and cosine rules, area of triangle (Extended)
3D trigonometry and trigonometric graphs (Extended)
Vector notation: column vectors, magnitude, direction
Vector operations: addition, subtraction, scalar multiplication
Geometric transformations: reflection, rotation, translation, enlargement, including matrices for transformations (Extended)
Simple vector geometry and vector paths
Probability scale: theoretical and experimental probability, relative frequency
Simple combined events: listing outcomes, sample space diagrams
Tree diagrams and Venn diagrams for probability
Independent and mutually exclusive events, conditional probability (Extended)
Data collection: questionnaires, sampling, tally charts, frequency tables
Data presentation: pictograms, bar charts, pie charts, histograms, stem-and-leaf, cumulative frequency diagrams, box-and-whisker plots
Measures of central tendency and spread: mean, median, mode, range, quartiles, interquartile range
Scatter diagrams and correlation, line of best fit
